hero.corrosion: object (optional) {dmg:int, duration:int} — if present, ranged attacks inflict Corrosion

rules: REQ-001: CLI argument --scenario N selects the world from src/scenarios.js (getScenario(N), 1-based).
REQ-002: turn = turn + 1 after every action attempt (including a blocked move or a no-op attack). Battle advancement (REQ-018) and Corrosion ticks (REQ-019) consume no extra turn.

REQ-003: A melee attack deals simultaneous mutual damage: hero damages the target (amount per REQ-017) AND that enemy subtracts its atk from the hero (mediated by Mana Shield REQ-012). Enemies never act on their own; there is no enemy turn, movement, or AI.
REQ-005: Win/Lose checks occur strictly post-action (after Corrosion ticks and any battle advancement).
REQ-006: If, post-action, both hero.hp <= 0 and all current-battle enemies <= 0, status = DEFEAT (before VICTORY).
REQ-007: A scenario whose INITIAL enemy count is 0 results in FINISHED, not VICTORY.

REQ-008: Print these lines, in order, nothing else: status, turn, hero_hp, hero_pos, enemies. Each enemy is EXACTLY {id, hp, pos} — DO NOT include atk/unit_type/status. mana, anomaly_dmg, corrosion, terrain, unit_type, status, route, route_index are INTERNAL and NEVER printed.
REQ-009: Actions exhausted with neither VICTORY nor DEFEAT -> FINISHED.
REQ-010: A move is blocked (pos unchanged, no combat) when destination is off-grid (negative), occupied by a living enemy, or a 'Wall' cell (REQ-015). turn still increments.

REQ-011: An action is {type:'attack', target} (melee, REQ-003), {type:'move', dir:[dx,dy]} (REQ-010), or {type:'ranged_attack', target} (REQ-014). Melee needs orthogonal adjacency (dist==1) else no-op.
REQ-012: Mana Shield. hero.mana (default 0) absorbs incoming melee damage first: absorbed=min(incoming,mana); mana-=absorbed (>=0); overflow hits hp. mana only changes on received melee damage.

REQ-013: Anomaly rupture. If within a single MELEE attack hero.mana goes >0 -> <=0, then after damage and before post-action checks, every orthogonally-adjacent living enemy takes the rupture's anomaly damage (REQ-016/017), once per action, melee only.

REQ-014: Ranged attack. {type:'ranged_attack', target} hits only if the target is alive and 2<=Manhattan distance<=3: hero damages it (REQ-017), takes nothing in return (mana unaffected, never ruptures), and (REQ-019) inflicts Corrosion if hero.corrosion is set. Adjacent/out-of-range/missing/dead = no-op. Terrain does not block ranged. turn still increments.

REQ-015: Terrain (static). 'Wall' blocks the hero's move (added to REQ-010), not ranged/melee/mana/anomaly. 'Conductive' under the hero at rupture time doubles the base anomaly amount (REQ-016). Terrain never changes within a battle.
REQ-016: Conductive doubles the base anomaly amount (hero.anomaly_dmg*2) before per-enemy REQ-017 multipliers.

REQ-017: Enemy unit_type (optional, one). 'Hardened' = melee to it -1 (min 0) before other factors; ranged/anomaly/corrosion unaffected. 'Glass' = ALL incoming damage to it doubled (melee, ranged, anomaly, AND corrosion ticks). 'Resonant' = hero takes 1 hp damage each time this enemy is hit by an anomaly rupture. Damage to a targeted enemy: melee=(Glass?2:1)*max(0,hero.atk-(Hardened?1:0)); ranged=(Glass?2:1)*hero.atk; anomaly=(Glass?2:1)*baseAnomaly.

REQ-018: Route map. initialState may include 'route' (array of FOLLOWING battles; the first battle is top-level enemies/terrain). If absent, single battle, behavior unchanged. After an action (and after Corrosion ticks), if the CURRENT battle's enemies are all dead AND the hero is alive AND further battles remain (route_index < route.length), immediately load the next battle: enemies = fresh copies of route[route_index].enemies, terrain replaced by that battle's, hero.pos reset to [0,0], hero hp/atk/mana/anomaly_dmg/corrosion persist, route_index += 1 (no extra turn). VICTORY only when all current enemies are dead AND no further battles remain. DEFEAT (hp<=0) ends the run any time. The printed enemies are always the current battle's.

REQ-019: Status effect — Corrosion (damage over time). The hero may carry an optional hero.corrosion = {dmg:int, duration:int}. If absent, ranged attacks inflict no status and all prior behavior is byte-for-byte unchanged. If present, a successful ranged_attack (REQ-014) ALSO inflicts Corrosion on the target: set the target's status to {type:'Corrosion', duration: hero.corrosion.duration, dmg: hero.corrosion.dmg} (re-applying refreshes the duration to that value; no additive stacking). At the END of every hero action attempt — after the action's combat/rupture, and BEFORE route advancement (REQ-018) and the post-action win/loss check (REQ-005) — each living enemy (hp>0) carrying a Corrosion status with duration>0 takes status.dmg damage (doubled if that enemy is Glass per REQ-017; Hardened does NOT reduce it), then that enemy's status.duration decreases by 1 and the status is removed when it reaches 0. A corrosion tick can kill an enemy and thereby clear a battle (which then advances per REQ-018). status is INTERNAL and never printed.

lines: hero_pos: <a JSON array [x, y] of integers>
enemies: <a JSON array; each enemy is EXACTLY {"id":..., "hp":..., "pos":[x,y]} — DO NOT include atk>
